signals.headline: Key drivers of recent inflation:** Producer prices increased for the sixth consecutive month in February, rising 2
signals.raw:
Key drivers of recent inflation:** Producer prices increased for the sixth consecutive month in February, rising 2.4% year-over-year, driven primarily by surging global oil costs with diesel and naphtha prices spiking 7.4% and 8.7% respectively[5]. Food and energy prices remain primary inflationary concerns despite recent moderation from favorable harvest effects and fuel tax adjustments[2].

signals.headline: JD Vance**, as Vice President, rallied with Turning Point USA in Georgia on April 15 amid low turnout and criticism over
signals.raw:
JD Vance**, as Vice President, rallied with Turning Point USA in Georgia on April 15 amid low turnout and criticism over Trump-related feuds, following a failed Pakistan trip on the Iran war—no White House ties or market-moving confirmations.[2]  
No connections found between Hathaway, Vance, the White House, or Republicans in April events; search results lack recent (post-March) developments.[3]

signals.raw:
BOK HOLDS RATE AT 2.5% AS INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH** | NO | HIGH confidence

South Korea's **annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026**, exceeding the Bank of Korea's 2% target and market forecasts of 2.4%[1].
